about.label: Founder of Kelek Home
about.name: Hi, I'm Jesús
about.intro: I'm a craftsman from Madrid with over 10 years shaping wood. I create unique furniture that combines functionality, design and a deep respect for natural materials.
about.story_p1: It all started in my grandfather's workshop, where I learned that wood has a life of its own. Every grain, every knot, every colour has a story to tell. From a young age I spent my afternoons sanding, assembling and watching shapeless pieces become objects with soul.
about.story_p2: Years later, I decided to turn that passion into my profession. I founded Kelek Home with a clear idea: to create furniture that lasts generations, handmade with responsibly sourced materials and a design that doesn't follow trends — it transcends them.
about.val1_desc: I personally craft every piece, from the sketch to the final finish.
about.val2_desc: Only responsibly sourced wood and non-toxic eco-friendly finishes.
about.val3_desc: Clean aesthetics that fit any home and never go out of style.
about.workshop_desc: I work from a small workshop on the outskirts of Madrid. Here every piece comes to life among traditional tools, the smell of freshly worked wood and a lot of patience.

profile.bio: My name is Jesús and at KELEK HOME you won't just find a handcrafted furniture corner — you'll also find a passion for handmade work and a nod to nature.

why.title: Why artisanal?
why.subtitle: Every piece has a story behind it.
why.handmade_desc: Every piece is personally crafted, with no mass production or shortcuts.
why.sustainable_desc: We use natural woods from responsible sources with eco-friendly finishes.
why.unique_desc: No two are the same. Your furniture is exclusive and has its own character.

process.title: My process
process.subtitle: From the forest to your home, step by step.
process.sketch_desc: Design and planning of every detail.
process.selection_desc: I choose the perfect wood for each piece.
process.home_desc: The piece arrives ready to transform your space.

testimonials.title: What they say
testimonials.subtitle: Customers who already have a Kelek Home piece.
testimonials.quote_1: I bought a coffee table and it's simply beautiful. The wood quality and finish are impeccable. Worth every penny.
testimonials.quote_2: Jesús is an incredible craftsman. My modular shelving unit looked perfect in the living room. Personal service and very fast delivery.
testimonials.quote_3: I'd been looking for furniture with character for years. I finally found what I wanted. Every piece is a work of art.

newsletter.title: Be the first to know
newsletter.subtitle: Notify me when a new piece is available. No spam, just artisan news.
